title: Lemons on the Lot
premise: Your beater just died, and you need a reliable used car by Friday to get to work. But the dealer knows exactly which vehicles are ticking time bombs. You can either trust a salesman who speaks in code or bring a mechanic friend, but every odometer rollback and salvage title is hidden in plain sight.
setting: A sprawling used car dealership on a dusty highway strip. The lot is packed with everything from gleaming SUVs to rust-bucket sedans. The sales office is a cramped trailer with a coffee pot and a wall of dubious 'certified' plaques.
goal: Acquire a vehicle that passes a basic inspection and gets you to work for at least 6 months, spending no more than $8,000. The scenario ends when you drive off the lot with a car or when Friday passes without a purchase.
gm_notes: Secretly assign each listed car a hidden defect (e.g., transmission slip, flood damage, odometer rollback). The dealer's hidden agenda: offload the worst lemon (Car C) first. Let the player haggle and inspect. If they bring a mechanic NPC (unlocked by a high-Int check or paying $100), reveal one defect per car. Introduc a competing buyer (artillery) who tries to buy the best car out from under them.

roles.name: Skeptical Buyer
roles.description: A thrifty office worker who needs a car ASAP but hates being cheated.
roles.private_info: Your budget is $8,000 cash. You have a cousin who is a mechanic but she's busy until Saturday—too late.

npcs.name: Vince 'Viper' Viscosi
npcs.description: The salesman, a fast-talker in a cheap suit, always grinning.
npcs.hidden_agenda: Sell the flood-damaged sedan (Car C) first; it's been on the lot 90 days. He gets a $500 bonus for moving it.

npcs.name: Car A (2014 Honda Civic)
npcs.hidden_agenda: Odometer rolled back 40,000 miles; transmission whines in 3rd gear.

npcs.name: Car B (2008 Ford F-150)
npcs.description: Rust spots but runs strong, according to Vince.
npcs.hidden_agenda: Frame damage from a collision; needs new brakes and tires ($2,000).

npcs.name: Car C (2012 Nissan Altima)
npcs.description: Looks good, smells like air freshener.
npcs.hidden_agenda: Flood car—electronics are intermittent, mold in the vents, will fail in 2 months.

npcs.name: Artie 'The Arranger'
npcs.description: A quiet, well-dressed man browsing the lot.
npcs.hidden_agenda: He's a wholesaler looking to snap up Car A for export—if the buyer hesitates, he'll offer $7,500 cash on the spot.
